theme: Athens — Where history meets team spirit

linkedin.text:
Last month, we took 40 executives to Athens.

Not for a conference in a hotel ballroom.
For something they'll never forget.

Day 1: Private sunset dinner at a rooftop overlooking the Acropolis
Day 2: Team challenge through the Plaka — history, strategy, collaboration
Day 3: Olive oil tasting in a 200-year-old grove outside the city

The Parthenon was the backdrop. The real transformation happened between people.

By day 3, teams that barely spoke in the office were finishing each other's sentences.

That's what happens when you take people out of their comfort zone — together.

Athens isn't just a destination. It's a catalyst.

📩 alon@upe.co.il | 🌐 upe.co.il

#Athens #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #IncentiveTravel #Greece #EventProduction #UproductionEvents #Leadership

facebook.text:
What happens when you take 40 executives out of the boardroom and put them at the foot of the Acropolis?

Magic. That's what happens.

🏛️ Sunset dinner overlooking Athens
🏺 Team challenge through ancient streets
🫒 Olive oil tasting in a centuries-old grove

By day 3, strangers became partners. Colleagues became friends.

Athens isn't just beautiful — it transforms teams.
